The following events took place in '''119 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] discovers the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Orax]].
*[[Nerra Ziveri]] assumes charge of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] [[Almas Academy]].<ref name="Nerra Ziveri date">The ''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]'' mentions that Nerra Ziveri became the headmaster of the Almas Academy 87 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], which is dated to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. It can therefore Ziveri assumed charge of the academy in 119 BBY.</ref>

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-03-XX -->''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]'' {{Imo}}
